---
title: "Print Reporting"
---

I'm a general assignment reporter who can quickly learn new subjects and communicate complex topics to readers. I have bylines in the Houston Chronicle, UPI, The Daily Northwestern and more. 


[Opponents of median safety ordinance protest rule as ban goes into effect](https://www.columbiamissourian.com/news/local/opponents-of-median-safety-ordinance-protest-rule-as-ban-goes-into-effect/article_0f61af59-ff8d-40c5-a851-5e8c1ab5e953.html)

[Lawmakers struggle to find consensus on health care reforms](https://medillonthehill.medill.northwestern.edu/2026/01/lawmakers-struggle-to-find-consensus-on-health-care-reforms/)

[Nationally celebrated principal Emily Cole dies at 83](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LQch5F4rsW5yRzvB8sfQ6B69VlPvIqGR/view)

[Northwestern celebrates newly minted Nobel Prize winner Prof. Joel Mokyr at Monday press conference](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2025/10/14/campus/northwestern-celebrates-newly-minted-nobel-prize-winner-prof-joel-mokyr-at-monday-press-conference/)

[Supreme Court weighs freight broker liability in negligent hiring case](https://www.upi.com/Top_News/US/2026/03/04/supreme-court-broker-liability-truckers/6961772659966/)

[Mizzou sunsets PAWS program after three years](https://www.columbiamissourian.com/news/higher_education/mizzou-sunsets-paws-program-after-three-years/article_c67be79a-cc57-40dd-9198-133324750dd9.html)

[SMART combats substance use disorder at the Cook County jail](https://www.medilltrialmonitors.com/p/smart-combats-substance-use-disorder)

[Some NU Jewish faculty criticize Trump administration’s efforts to curtail antisemitism](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2025/04/16/lateststories/some-nu-jewish-faculty-criticize-trump-administrations-efforts-to-curtail-antisemitism/)
